title: Luscious Egyptian Couscous Stir-Fry
description: A light, umami-packed Egyptian inspired stir-fry with parmesan and a fragrant spice blend, perfect for a quick hangover cure.

ingredients.name: spice blend
ingredients.notes: cumin, coriander, paprika, ginger, garlic powder, turmeric

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil, then stir in couscous, cover, remove from heat, and let stand 5 minutes to absorb water.
While couscous rests, heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the cooked chickpeas and chicken to the skillet, sautéing for 2 minutes to warm through.
Stir in the mixed vegetables and cook until just tender, about 3 minutes.
Sprinkle the spice blend over the mixture, tossing to coat evenly.
Add the tamari sauce, lemon juice, and grated parmesan, stirring until the cheese melts and the flavors meld.
Gently fold in the steamed couscous, ensuring all components are well combined and heated through.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra lemon or tamari if desired, then serve hot.
